== Notes for [[Item:Q109935|Q109935]] ==

* '''3rd Umayyad Caliph'''
* Reign:

"Mu'awiya ibn Yazid ibn Mu'awiya (Arabic: مُعَاوِيَة بْنِ يَزِيد بْنِ مُعَاوِيَة, romanized: Muʿāwiya ibn Yazīd ibn Muʿāwiya; c. 664–684), commonly known as Mu'awiya II, was the third Umayyad caliph, ruling for less than a year in 683–684..."

"... Mu'awiya was the son of Yazid I and an unknown mother from the Kalb tribe. She is often confused with Umm Hashim Fakhitah bint Abi Hisham, mother of Mu'awiya's half-brother Khalid ibn Yazid...[1]"

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mu%27awiya_II

Source 2: http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muawiya_II.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
